description: A guest checking out is disputing a minibar charge on their bill, claiming they did not consume the item.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the guest's folio and identify the disputed charge.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the $8 charge for a snack item on the folio.

nodes.task_description: Check the housekeeping logs to see when the minibar charge was posted.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the charge was posted by housekeeping this morning.

nodes.task_description: As a gesture of goodwill, waive the disputed charge and remove it from the final bill.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully removes the charge from the folio to ensure guest satisfaction.
